title: Constancy of the ratio of circumference to diameter
description: In this talk, I discuss an intuitive proof of the fact that the ratio of circumference to diameter is independent of the circle.

title: It’s a Math Math Math World with Divakaran & Shraddha
description: A podcast series where Prof. Divakaran serves as a tour guide to mathematics for the "average student" Shraddha, exploring the beauty and accessibility of the subject.
